Quest Item
This item can be used in tradeskills.

Capacity: 10 Size Capacity: GIANT

Uploaded January 13th, 2023 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
Bulk craft Clump of Dough?
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2026 at 4:10 PM Rating: Decent
Starhawk
11 posts
Do I really have to make the dough one at a time? If you know a way, pls let me know.
▲ Page top
Bulk craft Clump of Dough?
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2026 at 6:50 PM Rating: Good
Dogpaw
Guru
537 posts
Starhawk wrote:
Do I really have to make the dough one at a time? If you know a way, pls let me know.



This is the page for how to make a mixing bowl. Not how to make dough.

If you go to the page for making dough then you will see that the type of egg you use will affect how many clumps of dough you wind up with.

Example if you use Griffon eggs you will get 7 clumps of dough or if you use Dragon egg you get 20 clumps of dough.
▲ Page top
vendor

# Dec 30 2006 at 2:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593366298790
Scholar
134 posts
This recipe need to be fixed...

To make a mixing bowl you need to combine a firing sheet and an unfired mixing bowl in a kiln

Trivial at 17
▲ Page top

▲ Page top
Can Also Be Made...
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2002 at 2:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250761715
View User Forum
Scholar
32 posts
If you need this for the Prayer Shawl quests, you might as well work on pottery as well. The mixing bowl can be made by combining 2 large blocks of clay, a large bowl sketch, and a flask of water on a pottery wheel.

You then need to fire it in a kiln. Combine your unfired mixing bowl with a high quality firing sheet.

The mixing bowl is trivial with a pottery skill of 128. If you need to learn pottery, there are some great guides at eqtraders.com.
▲ Page top
